name: io.verityscore/geo-audit
description: GEO readiness audit for Shopify stores. 5 read-only tools: get_geo_score (score + findings), check_ai_readiness (real-time AI file check), get_recommendations (top 3 fixes), explain_topic (19 AI commerce guides), get_vertical_info (15 e-commerce vertical checklists). Free, no authentication required.
